name: HR teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For HR teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, unusual employee hours cause payroll errors. We provide a payroll exception reporter instead of manual tracking in spreadsheets.
target_audience: HR teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
problem_solved: Unusual employee hours or compensation leading to payroll errors

locked_fields.primary_user: HR teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Unusual employee hours or compensation leading to payroll errors
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For HR teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, unusual employee hours cause payroll errors. We provide a payroll exception reporter instead of manual tracking in spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking and error checking in spreadsheets

one_liner: For HR teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, unusual employee hours cause payroll errors. We provide a payroll exception reporter instead of manual tracking in spreadsheets.
